description: Typical fun-doc output on get_stat_list_layer — recognizes the raw unvalidated field-read pattern, names appropriately, plate calls out the lack of validation.

captured.name: GetStatListLayer
captured.plate: Raw field read: returns the DWORD at offset +0x04 of a StatList structure. Unvalidated — no null check and no magic number validation. Callers must ensure the pointer is valid before calling.
